[[File:Mr.Prickles.png|thumb|left|385x385px]]{{clear}}[[Mr. Prickles' Shop]] is one of the in-app [[Shops|shops]]. He sells [[clothing]] items which users can purchase for their [[birb]] using [[Rainbow Stones|rainbow stones]]. Users can also [[#Sell|sell]] clothing items at half price for [[Rainbow Stones|rainbow stones]]. The shop inventory changes every day, but players can choose to [[#Store Refresh|refresh]] it early. [[File:MrPrickles.jpg|thumb|Mr. Prickles gives a gift of rainbow stones every day.]] 

==Basic Layout==
[[File:Oct2025-shops-layout.png|thumb|left|The current layout as of November 2025.]]

{{clear}}

Mr. Prickles' store is the first store in the shop tab when you click on the "shop button". It is on the top left corner of the popup and exclusively sells clothing. It contains five main features: A selection of 6-12 rotating clothing items in random specified colors (previous [[Seasonal Events]] and Collections items), the Everyday Collection of permanently available items in your choice of colors, and three key functions: [[#Search|try on]] clothing items for free (the magnifying glass icon), [[#Sell|sell]] items from your inventory (the gem bag icon), and [[#Store Refresh|refresh]] the story offerings (the cycle icon.)

===Rare Item Slots === 
[[File:Mr Prickles Rare Items.png|thumb]]Mr. Prickles' shop begins with 12 "rare" item slots. A free-to-play user can buy from the first 6 slots; a [[Finch Plus]] player can buy from all 12 slots plus a thirteenth "discount" item. The item color will be part of its' name, and the color cannot be switched to the player's choice. The player can only buy a preferred color item when it appears in that color at random in the store. Note that any item can appear in any slot; there are no members-only items. The members just have access to six more choices at a time. 

==== Location Item Slot ====
The first slot of the 12 is for a location-specific item. It is marked with a map icon, and has a different background color. Wherever the player's birb is, such as [[Vancouver, Canada|Vancourver]] or [[Tokyo, Japan|Tokyo]], an item will be offered that is unique to that area. For example, when a player's birb is in [[Finchie Forest]], an Acorn Hat or a Mushroom Cap or Squirrel Costume or Hood will be available. Again, the item color will be in the label and cannot be switched. 

====Event Items====

Although any item from any previous event has a chance of appearing in the store, each month there is a pool of items that have a higher probability of appearing. These items correspond to the [[Seasonal Events]] that occured in the same month in previous years. For example, in January, [[Starlight Magic]] (January 2023) and [[Buccaneer’s Bounty]] (January 2024) have higher odds of appearing in the store. October and December items get two weeks of additional exposure before their month begins.

Items from the current Seasonal Event will also rotate through the store in the following month. Free players that were previously restricted to four colours will be able to purchase items in random colors from the full range of colors.

==== 50% Off Sale Slot ====
For players with Finch Plus, at the top of the screen there is a board with a 50% off sale item that changes daily. There are '''no''' members-only items; this is simply a discount on one item. Players who don't have plus will just see a board encouraging them to join.

==== Exclusive Plushies ==== 
Every once in a while a [[Legendary Plushie Collection|plushie]] will show up in the rotating items, at a staggering price. A birb plushie costs 20k rainbow stones; various NPCs such as [[Mr. Prickles]] or [[Robin]] cost 15k. Each plushie comes in different color variations, but the shop offers them in a random color every time, not necessarily the one you want.  

Note: Plushies were originally added so that long-time players had something to buy with excess rainbow stones. New players need not feel vexed that they do not have enough savings to buy such luxury items. They will turn up in the shop again. (You can also get the "Grey Finch Plushie" from inviting and having two people join the Finch app.)
[[File:Mr Prickles Everyday Store.png|right|150px]] 
=== Everyday Collection ===
The Everyday Collection is posted below the shop slots. It includes simpler clothing that is always available. The player can choose their preferred color regardless of the displayed color. To switch the color the player just needs to select the item and scroll at the bottom. All of the color choices will show.{{clear}}

=== Catalog ===
[[File:MagnifyingGlassClothesSearchRedCircle.jpg|left|thumb]][[File:Mr Prickles Search.png|right|100px]]The catalog is at the top of the page. When you click on it, you can look at and try on every clothing item in the game, in each color variation. You can't actually purchase things here, but the price to buy these items is displayed underneath for reference. There are different sections for the different types of clothing (ex. hats, full body outfits, face masks, etc). It also includes every location-exclusive item from every location in the game. 

=== Sell ===
[[File:RainbowstonesBagRedCircle.jpg|left|thumb]]To sell items in the shops, click the icon of a black bag with a rainbow stone on it. It will show all of your clothing and the amount you can get for selling each individual item. The value is half of the purchase price; if you bought it for 500 rainbow stones, Mr  Prickles will give you 250 for it. When you sell an item, it is removed from your inventory and outfits.{{clear}}  

=== Store Refresh ===
[[File:Screenshot_20250127-064547.jpg|400px]]{{clear}}The store inventory changes every day, and a countdown clock shows when it will happen. When the store is refreshed, all 12 items will be swapped out and new items will appear: again, 1 location-specific item, 5 other items, and another 6 that members can buy. The new items will be random, and usually different from the 12 just seen. Again they will be specific colors. With luck, an item you have been wanting will appear in the color you want. 

The player can also refresh the store without waiting for the next day. The player gets one free refresh per day. After this is used, the player must pay 10 rainbow stones to refresh again. Each additional refresh is more expensive, in increments of 25, up to 160, thus: 10, 35, 60, 85, 110, 135, 160. The cumulative total is 595 gems.

===Gifting=== 
Upon selecting an item from the store, you can choose whether to purchase it for yourself or buy it as a gift to a friend in your Friend Tree, for an additional fee of 200 gems. Click "Send Gift," and your friend list will pop up. Friends who already have the item will  be marked as "Owned." If not, they may still be off limits if you already sent them a gift that day; they will be marked "Gifted." The same item can be gifted to multiple Friends as long as it is available in the store. See [[#Duplicates|Duplicates]] for information if you want to buy it for yourself as well as friends. 

=== Duplicates===

[[File:ShopSold.jpg|thumb]]You can purchase the same item in various colors when they are offered. However, after purchasing, the same color item will not appear in the store again as long as you possess the item, because you can't have duplicates. 

The day you purchase it, it is grayed out in the store and marked "SOLD." The store Gift function is also turned off; it won't let you gift from the store while you own one. If you want to gift an item to your friend(s), start by gifting it to them directly from the store, while it is not marked Sold. You can gift as many friends as you want, and then buy one for yourself, if you like. If you do it backwards and buy one first, you can send your own to your friend, and then the store will let you buy or gift another. 

To repeat, the player will only ever see the same color in the store again if they sell the original or gift it from their inventory.
